channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Overcoming a Sexless Marriage: A Journey to Rekindling Intimacy
item.description: Tess and Craig, a couple in their late 50s, experienced a significant decline in their sexual relationship over three decades. After having children and entering perimenopause, Tess struggled with a l...

item.title: ED Freezes Trinamool Congress Bank Accounts Over Alleged Financial Irregularities
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has frozen three bank accounts of the Trinamool Congress (TMC), holding deposits worth Rs 440 crore, under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act. The party accused th...

item.title: Tanzania's Current Account Deficit Expands Due to Rising Import Costs
item.description: Tanzania's current account deficit expanded by 40% year-on-year to $2.91 billion in May 2026, driven by soaring import costs from global geopolitical tensions and elevated freight charges. This contra...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial, Flood Control Allegations, and Unemployment Data
item.description: The article covers key developments in the Philippines on July 8, 2026. Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial continues with her defense team arguing that her alleged grave threats against F...

item.title: Analysts Dispute Trump's $19.2 Trillion Manufacturing Investment Claim
item.description: President Donald Trump's assertion during a NATO summit press conference that the U.S. had invested $19.2 trillion in manufacturing plants and equipment faced sharp criticism from political analysts a...

item.title: Study Reveals Banned Toxic Chemicals Found in Recycled Plastics Used for Children’s Products
item.description: A University of Cape Town (UCT) study has uncovered traces of banned toxic chemicals in various children's products sold in South Africa, raising serious concerns about product safety. The research, l...

item.title: Anjelica Huston's 1960s Modeling Career and Transition to Acting
item.description: This article explores the early career of Anjelica Huston during the late 1960s, highlighting her rise as a high-fashion model before transitioning to acting. Born in 1951, Huston's unique aristocrati...

item.title: Zanzibar's Political Parties Sign Reconciliation Accord to Promote Unity
item.description: Zanzibar is set to witness a significant political development as President Dr Hussein Mwinyi is expected to preside over the signing of a reconciliation agreement between the ruling Chama Cha Mapindu...

item.title: Northern Governors and Traditional Rulers Discuss Regional Security Strategies in Kaduna
item.description: Northern Nigeria Governors’ Forum and Traditional Rulers’ Council held a joint meeting in Kaduna to address pressing security challenges facing the region. The gathering aimed to identify practical so...

item.title: State of Origin controversy erupts over disputed try decision
item.description: The NSW Blues secured a crucial State of Origin Series victory after a contentious try decision involving Jack Bostock and Bradman Best. The match, played at Suncorp Stadium, saw intense debate over w...

item.title: Young Kenyan Achieves Lawyer, Pastor, and Father Status by 30
item.description: A young Kenyan man known as Governor Kamau 049 has shocked social media by revealing he achieved three major life milestones by age 30. By 30, he was a qualified lawyer, established as a church minist...

item.title: PCSO Announces Megalotto 6/45 Jackpot Winner on July 8, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that a lone bettor won the Megalotto 6/45 jackpot prize of P15,000,000.00 on Wednesday, July 8, 2026. The winning numbers, 13-05-30-25-22-11,...

item.title: Amazon Prime Video ad legality faces judicial scrutiny in Australia
item.description: The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) is challenging Amazon Australia over alleged breaches of consumer law, claiming the streaming giant unfairly altered subscription terms by int...

item.title: Canadian Manufacturers Shift Production to U.S. Amid Trade Uncertainty
item.description: A 2026 KPMG survey reveals that 42% of Canadian manufacturers plan to shift or have already moved production to the U.S., driven by trade uncertainty and policy concerns. The report highlights that 29...

item.title: National Treasury investigates tender awards linked to former director Molefe Fani
item.description: The National Treasury has launched an investigation into the awarding of multimillion-rand tenders following allegations that former chief director Molefe Fani influenced the process to benefit associ...

item.title: EU Rules Against Apple's App Store Gatekeeper Challenge
item.description: The European Union's General Court ruled against Apple's challenge to its designation as a 'gatekeeper' under the Digital Markets Act (DMA), reinforcing obligations that require the company to allow a...

item.title: BARMM Election Dominant Parties Announced
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially declared the United Bangsamoro Justice Party as the dominant majority party and the Bangsamoro Federalist Party as the minority party for the first...

item.title: British Wildcard Arthur Fery Advances to Wimbledon Semi-Finals
item.description: Arthur Fery, the British wildcard, has made history by reaching the Wimbledon men's semi-finals, becoming only the second player in tournament history to achieve this feat since Goran Ivanisevic in 20...

item.title: Skepticism Surrounds Trump's Explanation for Switching Qatari Jet to Air Force One
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump faced scrutiny over his abrupt decision to switch from the Qatari-gifted jet to Air Force One after flying it to a NATO summit in Turkey. The move sparked skepticism, with ...

item.title: Halifax Police Seek Public Help in Locating Suspect in Costco Hate Crime
item.description: Halifax Regional Police are appealing to the public for assistance in locating a suspect involved in a racially motivated incident at a Costco store. The alleged attack, captured on video and shared o...
